queries.sphinxql:
drop table if exists tbl; create table tbl ( id BIGINT, model TEXT, storage_capacity INTEGER, color string, release_year INTEGER, price FLOAT, discounted_price FLOAT, sold BOOL, date_added TIMESTAMP, product_codes MULTI, `values` MULTI64, additional_info JSON, region_id INTEGER, warranty_months INTEGER, customer_score FLOAT, units_left INTEGER, serials MULTI64, category string, promo_score FLOAT, supplier_id BIGINT, batch_no INTEGER, flags MULTI ) engine='columnar';
insert into tbl (id,model,storage_capacity,color,release_year,price,discounted_price,sold,date_added,product_codes,`values`,additional_info,region_id,warranty_months,customer_score,units_left,serials,category,promo_score,supplier_id,batch_no,flags) values (101,'iPhone 13 Pro',256,'silver',2021,1099.98999,989.98999,1,2224442480,(1,2,3),(523456764345678976,9223372036854775807),'{"features":["ProMotion display","A15 Bionic chip","Ceramic Shield front cover"]}',1,24,4.5,35,(101001,101002),'smartphones',0.91,5001,77,(1,3,5));
